hero.title: With Love & Gratitude
hero.message: Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift we could ask for. However, if you wish to honor us with a gift, we have curated a registry of things we will need for our home and adventures together as a married couple.

items.title: Honeymoon Fund
items.description: Help us create unforgettable memories as we embark on our first journey as husband and wife to the Amalfi Coast.

image.alt: White sandy beach with turquoise water under a soft golden sunset.

items.title: Kitchen & Dining
items.description: Equipping our home for a lifetime of shared meals and hosted gatherings.

image.alt: Artisanal ceramic plates and fine glassware on a light stone countertop.

items.title: Home Essentials
items.description: The fine details that turn a house into a warm and welcoming home.

image.alt: Soft linen bedding with flowers in a glass vase on a bedside table.

items.title: Experiences
items.description: Contributing to our first year of dates, classes, and local adventures.

image.alt: Italian courtyard at dusk with string lights and a candlelit table for two.
